title: 有馬記念の後に・最後のキーワード

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Victory at the Arima Kinen! Gold Ship has
conquered the mountain of rivalry and taken the
summit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the final clue in hand, she stands ready to
open up the path to the promised Eden.
